ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithm_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm being run */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm being run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run ended */,
  "run_parameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing the parameters used for the run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "environment_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing details about the environment (e.g., hardware, software stack) */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Brief description or notes about the run */,
  "run_tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags associated with the run */,
  "run_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the run in seconds */,
  "resource_usage" TEXT /* JSON object containing resource usage metrics (e.g., CPU, memory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm run */,
  "time" REAL /* Time (in seconds) since the start of the run */,
  "best_cost" REAL /* Best cost achieved at this time */,
  "edge_count" INTEGER /* Number of edges processed at this time */,
  "iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations completed at this time */,
  "milestone_count" INTEGER /* Number of milestones reached at this time */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage at this time (in MB) */,
  "cpu_usage" INTEGER /* CPU usage at this time (in %) */,
  "disk_io" INTEGER /* Disk I/O operations at this time */,
  "network_io" INTEGER /* Network I/O operations at this time */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered at this time */,
  "warning_count" INTEGER /* Number of warnings encountered at this time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_tag_map" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm run */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "tag_id")
)
